title: koeleria oreophila subsp. barbatipalea
intro: Koeleria oreophila subsp. barbatipalea is a type of grass, specifically a perennial tufted grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Koeleria oreophila subsp. barbatipalea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress.
